title: Drone attack
title_en: Drone attack
description: Report of the Minister of Internal Affairs Ihor Klymenko. I am grateful for the prompt work to eliminate the consequences of the Russian attack on the Lavra. Conservation work on the Assumption Cathedral, which was the most damaged by Russian drones, has already been completed. The roof of the cathedral is covered so that the condition of the building does not deteriorate due to weather conditions. We are preparing to restore the cathedral, and this is already the responsibility, in particular, of the Ministry...
description_en: Report of the Minister of Internal Affairs Ihor Klymenko. I am grateful for the prompt work to eliminate the consequences of the Russian attack on the Lavra. Conservation work on the Assumption Cathedral, which was the most damaged by Russian drones, has already been completed. The roof of the cathedral is covered so that the condition of the building does not deteriorate due to weather conditions. We are preparing to restore the cathedral, and this is already the responsibility, in particular, of the Ministry...
description_uk: Доповідь міністра внутрішніх справ Ігоря Клименка. Вдячний за оперативну роботу з ліквідацією наслідків російського удару по Лаврі. Вже завершені роботи по консервації Успенського собору, який був найбільше пошкоджений російськими дронами. Дах собору перекритий, щоб стан будівлі не погіршився через погодні умови. Готуємо відновлення собору, і це вже відповідальність, зокрема, Міністерства...

title: Crimea: Power outage reported
title_en: Crimea: Power outage reported
description: Update: Ukrainian strikes hit energy, oil infrastructure in Russian-occupied Crimea as power outages continue, military confirms. The targets included the Tavriya Thermal Power Plant in Simferopol, an oil depot in Dzhankoi, two gas compressor stations, two electrical substations, three coastal radar stations, and a ZU-23-2 anti-aircraft twin-barreled autocannon, according to Robert "Madyar"...
description_en: Update: Ukrainian strikes hit energy, oil infrastructure in Russian-occupied Crimea as power outages continue, military confirms. The targets included the Tavriya Thermal Power Plant in Simferopol, an oil depot in Dzhankoi, two gas compressor stations, two electrical substations, three coastal radar stations, and a ZU-23-2 anti-aircraft twin-barreled autocannon, according to Robert "Madyar"...
description_uk: Update: Ukrainian strikes hit energy, oil infrastructure in Russian-occupied Crimea as power outages continue, military confirms. The targets included the Tavriya Thermal Power Plant in Simferopol, an oil depot in Dzhankoi, two gas compressor stations, two electrical substations, three coastal radar stations, and a ZU-23-2 anti-aircraft twin-barreled autocannon, according to Robert "Madyar"...

title: Kherson: Drone attack
title_en: Kherson: Drone attack
description: The Ukrainian flag was dropped from a drone on the Kinburn spit, - DeepState Analysts, following the Navy, clarify that there is no attack by the Defense Forces on the Kinburn spit now, and the appearance of the Ukrainian flag does not mean the withdrawal of the Russians. The flag was indeed on a slant, but it was dropped from the drone. In DeepState they call this a pleasant fact, but they emphasize that there is no confirmed exit of the occupiers from this territory....
description_en: The Ukrainian flag was dropped from a drone on the Kinburn spit, - DeepState Analysts, following the Navy, clarify that there is no attack by the Defense Forces on the Kinburn spit now, and the appearance of the Ukrainian flag does not mean the withdrawal of the Russians. The flag was indeed on a slant, but it was dropped from the drone. In DeepState they call this a pleasant fact, but they emphasize that there is no confirmed exit of the occupiers from this territory....
description_uk: Украинский флаг на Кинбурнскую косу сбросили с дрона, - DeepState Аналитики вслед за ВМС уточняют, что наступления Сил обороны на Кинбурнской косе сейчас нет, а появление украинского флага не означает отход россиян. Флаг действительно оказался на косе, но его сбросили с дрона. В DeepState называют это приятным фактом, однако подчеркивают, что подтверждений выхода оккупантов с этой территории нет....

Більш того, ворог продовжує застосовувати місцевість для пусків БПЛА "Молнія" в бік Миколаєва та Херсону та має інші засоби у вигляді РЕБ та...

title: Kyiv: Attack attack on energy grid
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack on energy grid
description: Ukraine faces possible daily 5-hour power cuts in July–August if Russian attacks continue, Ukrenergo says. "We understand that we will meet daytime demand through nuclear power, imports, distributed generation, and renewable energy, but unfortunately, we will have to rely on consumers to balance evening peaks," Vitaliy Zaichenko, CEO of state grid operator Ukrenergo, said.
description_en: Ukraine faces possible daily 5-hour power cuts in July–August if Russian attacks continue, Ukrenergo says. "We understand that we will meet daytime demand through nuclear power, imports, distributed generation, and renewable energy, but unfortunately, we will have to rely on consumers to balance evening peaks," Vitaliy Zaichenko, CEO of state grid operator Ukrenergo, said.
description_uk: Ukraine faces possible daily 5-hour power cuts in July–August if Russian attacks continue, Ukrenergo says. "We understand that we will meet daytime demand through nuclear power, imports, distributed generation, and renewable energy, but unfortunately, we will have to rely on consumers to balance evening peaks," Vitaliy Zaichenko, CEO of state grid operator Ukrenergo, said.

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
description: ⛽️ Ukrainian drones accelerate inflation in Russia: gasoline traveled at a record pace for the week, — Bloomberg After the strikes on Russian refineries, the average price of gasoline for the week immediately increased by 3% — this is the largest weekly jump in at least two decades. Bloomberg clarifies that since the beginning of 2026, Ukrainian drones have attacked Russian refineries at least 47 times. Economists note that these blows...
description_en: ⛽️ Ukrainian drones accelerate inflation in Russia: gasoline traveled at a record pace for the week, — Bloomberg After the strikes on Russian refineries, the average price of gasoline for the week immediately increased by 3% — this is the largest weekly jump in at least two decades. Bloomberg clarifies that since the beginning of 2026, Ukrainian drones have attacked Russian refineries at least 47 times. Economists note that these blows...
description_uk: ⛽️ Украинские дроны разгоняют инфляцию в россии: бензин за неделю подорожал рекордными темпами, — Bloomberg После ударов по российским НПЗ средняя цена бензина за неделю выросла сразу на 3% — это крупнейший недельный скачок как минимум за два десятилетия. Bloomberg уточняет, что с начала 2026 года украинские дроны атаковали российские НПЗ уже не менее 47 раз. Экономисты отмечают, что эти удары...

title: Attack attack
title_en: Attack attack
description: Our long-range operations are consistent, accurate responses to Russia's protracted war and strikes on Ukrainian cities and communities. Tonight, units of the Defense Forces hit the "Poltavska" oil depot in the Krasnodar region. The distance to the target is about 300 kilometers from the front line. In the morning, the SBU hit two refineries in Ufa - "Bashneft-Ufaneftekhim" and "Bashneft-Novoil". It is 1500 kilometers from...
description_en: Our long-range operations are consistent, accurate responses to Russia's protracted war and strikes on Ukrainian cities and communities. Tonight, units of the Defense Forces hit the "Poltavska" oil depot in the Krasnodar region. The distance to the target is about 300 kilometers from the front line. In the morning, the SBU hit two refineries in Ufa - "Bashneft-Ufaneftekhim" and "Bashneft-Novoil". It is 1500 kilometers from...
description_uk: Наші далекобійні операції – це послідовні точні відповіді на затягування Росією війни та удари по українських містах і громадах. Сьогодні вночі підрозділи Сил оборони уразили нафтобазу «Полтавська» у Краснодарському регіоні. Відстань до цілі – близько 300 кілометрів від лінії фронту. Вранці було влучання СБУ по двох НПЗ в Уфі – «Башнефть-Уфанефтехим» і «Башнефть-Новойл». Це 1500 кілометрів від...

title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
description: 😱Venezuela was shaken by two powerful earthquakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5. The number of victims can be counted in thousands. In less than a minute, the country was covered by two strong earthquakes. In Caracas, buildings collapsed, roads and infrastructure were damaged, the authorities declared a state of emergency, and rescuers continue to search for people under the rubble. There are no official data on the dead and injured yet. But...
description_en: 😱Venezuela was shaken by two powerful earthquakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5. The number of victims can be counted in thousands. In less than a minute, the country was covered by two strong earthquakes. In Caracas, buildings collapsed, roads and infrastructure were damaged, the authorities declared a state of emergency, and rescuers continue to search for people under the rubble. There are no official data on the dead and injured yet. But...
description_uk: 😱Венесуэлу потрясли два мощных землетрясения магнитудой 7,2 и 7,5. Число жертв может исчисляться тысячами Менее чем за минуту страну накрыли два сильнейших подземных толчка. В Каракасе обрушились здания, повреждены дороги и инфраструктура, власти объявили режим чрезвычайной ситуации, а спасатели продолжают искать людей под завалами. Официальных данных о погибших и пострадавших пока нет. Но...

title: Kyiv: 24 injured
title_en: Kyiv: 24 injured
description: Russian drone strikes across Sumy Oblast injure 15. A series of Russian drone strikes across Sumy Oblast on June 24 injured at least 15 civilians, including three children, regional authorities reported.

description_uk: Міністр Андрій Сибіга привітав Світлану Ільчук, українську експертку, з обранням до Комітету ООН з прав дитини 🇺🇦🇺🇳 💬 "Поки Україна продовжує протидіяти жорстокій агресії Росії та захищати наших наймолодших громадян від її жахливих наслідків, наша держава формує нову парадигму захисту дітей у зонах конфлікту. Наші експерти володіють унікальним, набутим на власному досвіді знанням і стійкими...
